drl:
rule "R0"
no-loop
when
    ( T2(f0 < 5, f0 <= 1.0) )
    or
    ( T2(f0 < 5, f0 <= 1.0) )
then
end
rule "R1"
when
    T1($b1_0_0 : f1, $b1_0_1 : f0)
then
    insert(new T2(1, $b1_0_1, "beta"));
end
rule "R2"
salience($b2_0_1)
agenda-group "ga"
when
    $p2_0 : T1($b2_0_0 : f1, $b2_0_1 : f0)
    exists T0(f1 not in (true, false, false), f1 == true, f0 >= $b2_0_1)
then
    delete($p2_0);
end
rule "R3"
salience -10
when
    ( $p3_0 : T1($b3_0_0 : f0, $b3_0_1 : f1, f1 == false) )
    or
    ( $p3_0 : T1($b3_0_0 : f0, $b3_0_1 : f1, f1 == false) )
then
    drools.setFocus("ga");
    insert(new T2(11, $p3_0.getF0(), "a"));
    modify($p3_0) { setF1(true), setF0($p3_0.getF0()) }
end
rule "R4"
salience -2
agenda-group "gb"
when
    accumulate( T0($s4_0 : f0); $a4_0 : sum($s4_0) )
then
    insert(new T2($a4_0, -3.0, "zz"));
end
